---
title: "The SABRhood"
description: "MLB analysis for fans, journalists, and broadcasters."
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.home-hero__copy}
<span class="hero-kicker">Baseball intelligence for the whole neighborhood</span>

# See the game before the box score explains it.

The SABRhood combines pitch-level research, daily signals, simulation, history, and journalistic reporting for fans and broadcasters.

[Open today’s signal desk](today.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Explore the Pitch Lab](pitch-lab.qmd){.btn .btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.home-hero__rail}
<div class="hero-rail__label">Built for</div>
<div class="hero-rail__item"><strong>Fans</strong><span>Understand what changed and why it matters.</span></div>
<div class="hero-rail__item"><strong>Broadcasters</strong><span>Arrive with evidence, context, and the next question.</span></div>
<div class="hero-rail__item"><strong>Journalists</strong><span>Move from a lead to reproducible research.</span></div>
:::
:::

{{< include includes/home-snapshot.html >}}

{{< include includes/home-story-desk.html >}}

{{< include includes/home-player-change.html >}}

{{< include includes/home-projections.html >}}

{{< include includes/home-research.html >}}

{{< include includes/home-team-pulse.html >}}

::: {.feature-band}
::: {.feature-band__copy}
<span class="eyebrow">Research, not decoration</span>

## Every chart should answer a baseball question

Our products connect outcomes to pitch traits, sequence, handedness, workload, game state, and historical context. Methods and sample reliability travel with the number.
:::

::: {.feature-band__links}
[Player intelligence](players.qmd){.feature-link}
[Player Change Engine](player-change-engine.qmd){.feature-link}
[Performance races](races.qmd){.feature-link}
[Story Engine](story-desk.qmd){.feature-link}
[Matchup edges](matchups.qmd){.feature-link}
[Team pulse](teams.qmd){.feature-link}
[History desk](history.qmd){.feature-link}
[Daily newsletter](newsletter.qmd){.feature-link}
[Research archive](blog.qmd){.feature-link}
[Broadcast services](broadcast.qmd){.feature-link}
[Read the methodology](methodology.qmd){.feature-link}
:::
:::
